roles.name: Sales
roles.description: Review customer demand, order progress, and delivery-related information.

roles.name: Planner
roles.description: Maintain production plans, scheduling cadence, and work-order priorities.

roles.name: Production Supervisor
roles.description: Track line execution, resolve exceptions, and coordinate shop-floor resources.

roles.name: Operator
roles.description: Perform station tasks, report production, scan, and submit shop-floor feedback.

roles.name: Quality
roles.description: Handle inspections, quality decisions, exception reviews, and release activities.

roles.name: Warehouse
roles.description: Handle receiving, issuing, stock movement, staging, and warehouse execution tasks.
